inventory: 3 receipts (INTEREST ONLY stamps — evidence of Ledger fraud)
mira.notes: Pip's debt resolved (Cassin closed the account). Mira's 75gp payments swallowed by interest — potential fraud case with Vael Orun.

aldric.notes: Delivered Partition Writ to Magistrate Sera Voss. Travelling to Aelindra.

sylvara.notes: Authenticated Partition Writ before Magistrate Voss. Logged the moment in her notebook. Reconsidering century-old position on preserving the Tome of Unraveling. Travelling to Aelindra.

bram.notes: STAYING IN DUSKPORT. Orders from Zaryth: (1) Guard the 3 captives in Voss custody — VN Op3, Guard 3, Rooftop Watcher. No early release under any circumstances. (2) Support Magistrate Voss's inquiry as needed. (3) Send pigeon to party if: captives escape, Calder makes a move, Voss inquiry is threatened, or any Vel Noctis/Unchained Compact activity detected. Intimidation modifier: +1 (CHA -1 + prof +2).

thessaly.notes: STAYING IN DUSKPORT. Orders from Zaryth: (1) Monitor House Aldenmere's remaining network — report any movement by Calder or family allies. (2) Support Voss inquiry with intelligence as needed. (3) Send pigeon to party if: Calder moves against Voss, any Unchained Compact operatives detected in Duskport, or captives are threatened. Expertise: Stealth + Deception. House Aldenmere on her list.

orindel.notes: Insight modifier: +4 (WIS +2 + prof +2). Carrying Maret's sealed letter for Veyra Solund. Travelling to Aelindra.

pip.notes: Debt resolved. Knows Mira was paying his debt. Unknowingly carried the Repository key 6 months ago. Spellbook now protected in travel case.

zaryth.notes: Ruined signet ring moved to different pocket after S2. Iron disc expended — kept as physical evidence of Unchained Compact. Leading travel party to Aelindra.
